channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Statin use after breast cancer diagnosis linked to better survival in hormone receptor-positive early breast cancer
item.description: Prediagnostic statin use did not improve survival, but postdiagnostic use was associated with better outcomes in early breast cancer.

item.title: Study Finds No Link Between Semaglutide and AMD Risk
item.description: Semaglutide does not increase the risk of neovascular age-related macular degeneration compared to other glucose-lowering drugs in adults.

item.title: AI Brings Oxygen Therapy Closer to Autopilot
item.description: EMILY.AI uses artificial intelligence to personalize oxygen delivery in real time, aiming for safer saturation control and fewer manual adjustments.

item.title: New Lassa fever vaccine shows promising results in first human trial
item.description: Researchers at the University of Maryland School of Medicine report encouraging results from the first clinical trial of a Lassa fever vaccine.
